testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should initialize with default values
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should initialize with default values

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should calculate monthly payment correctly using French amortization formula
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should calculate monthly payment correctly using French amortization formula

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should calculate correct monthly payment for 100,000 at 18% for 3 years
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should calculate correct monthly payment for 100,000 at 18% for 3 years

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should calculate correct total payment and interest
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should calculate correct total payment and interest

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should calculate max financing based on 35% of monthly income
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should calculate max financing based on 35% of monthly income

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should respect credit type max amount limit
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should respect credit type max amount limit

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should use correct interest rate from credit type
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should use correct interest rate from credit type

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should handle zero interest rate edge case
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should handle zero interest rate edge case

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should recalculate when term changes
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should recalculate when term changes

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should ensure monthly payment is a positive number
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should ensure monthly payment is a positive number

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should handle loading state correctly
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should handle loading state correctly

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should render the wizard with initial step (personal data)
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should render the wizard with initial step (personal data)

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should show error when fullName is empty
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should show error when fullName is empty

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should show error when email is empty
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should show error when email is empty

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should validate email format
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should validate email format

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should show error when phone is empty
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should show error when phone is empty

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should advance to step 2 when personal data is valid
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should advance to step 2 when personal data is valid

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should validate positive monthly salary
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should validate positive monthly salary

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should call onClose when clicking cancel and user confirms
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should call onClose when clicking cancel and user confirms

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should not call onClose when clicking cancel if user cancels confirmation
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should not call onClose when clicking cancel if user cancels confirmation

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should allow navigation back to previous step
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should allow navigation back to previous step

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should submit form successfully when all data is valid
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should submit form successfully when all data is valid

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should handle submission error
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should handle submission error
